message:
Fix std::from_chars<double> unavailability on arm64-darwin

Apple's libc++ 19 does not implement std::from_chars for floating-point
types, breaking the Nix arm64-darwin CI build. Replace the try_int and
try_double lambdas with inline parsing, using parsers::real (backed by
fast_float) for doubles instead of std::from_chars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
